attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ORGANIZATION_ID,
BUSINESS_GROUP_ID,
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(DATE_FROM,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE_FROM,
ORGANIZATION_NAME AS NAME,
COALESCE(LOCATION_ID,0) AS LOCATION_ID,
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(DATE_TO,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS DATE_TO,
INTERNAL_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
INTERNAL_ADDRESS_LINE,
CASE WHEN (LAST_UPDATE_DATE IS NULL or LAST_UPDATE_DATE='') THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST(SUBSTR(LAST_UPDATE_DATE,1,19) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
-1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
-1 AS LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
-1 AS CREATED_BY,
CAST(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(CREATION_DATE,1,10)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATION_DATE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
0 AS BATCH_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME,
ORGANIZATION_CODE,
OFFSET_NUMBER,
PARTITION_NUMBER,
RECORD_COUNT
FROM
$$STGDB.PST_CLOUD_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS
